sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111068" key="filoboiwto/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλο-βοιωτός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n111068.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">fond of the Boeotians,</tr_> Hdn.Gr.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0099.tlg001.perseus-grc1:1:228" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.228</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
